title: Household hardware
content: Household hardware (or simply, hardware) is equipment that can be touched or held by hand such as keys, lock s, nut s, screw s, washer s, hinge s, latch es, handle s, wire, chain s, belt s, plumbing supplies, electrical supplies, tool s, utensil s, cutlery and machine parts. Household hardware is typically sold in hardware store s.
